alerts.description:
Westbound transit riders who require the use of an elevator can plan ahead to board or exit SR 520 transit service at the Clyde Hill/Yarrow Point Freeway Station instead. Transit passengers who need to get to Evergreen Point Station can transfer to eastbound routes 271 or ST 542 from the stop on NE Pacific St & Montlake Blvd NE - Bay 1 (EB) and use the elevator at the eastbound stop.

The Clyde Hill/Yarrow Point Freeway station elevators in both directions have resumed operation.
alerts.title: The elevator at SR 520 & Evergreen Point Rd (WB) is out of service until further notice.

alerts.description:
Get on/off at:
The temporary stop on Bothell Way NE at the 5800 block, near the Dentist Offices (EB)
alerts.title: Routes 322, 331, 372, and ST 522: Due to the Stride construction project at NE Bothell Way and 61st Ave NE, a long-term temporary stop has been established until Sunday, September 13.

alerts.title: Route 70 to Downtown Seattle is rerouted off Fairview Ave N between Aloha St and Valley St from Fri May 22 through Mon Aug 31 due to construction.

alerts.description:
Affected routes:
70

Get on/off at:
The temporary stop on Eastlake Ave E just before E Allison St (NB)

To learn more about the construction impacts that are part of the upgrade of Route 70 into the RapidRide J Line please visit SDOT’s website link:

https://www.seattle.gov/transportation/projects-and-programs/programs/transit-program/transit-plus-multimodal-corridor-program/rapidride-roosevelt
alerts.title: Stop #9550 Eastlake Ave E & E Allison St (NB) relocated until Fri Aug 28 at 7:00 PM due to construction.
